title: Deadlier Than the Male
writer: Julien Duvivier, Charles Dorat, Maurice Bessy
actors: Jean Gabin, Danièle Delorme, Robert Arnoux
plot: André Chatelin is a restaurant owner in Les Halles in Paris. One morning, a girl named Catherine asks to see him. She happens to be the daughter of his estranged wife, Gabrielle, that André left more than twenty years before. As G...
